summary: Comprehensive frontend testing after the EN/ID bilingual overhaul (LanguageContext refactor). Verified: (a) default language = ID, (b) LanguageToggle EN/ID pill with correct aria-pressed state, (c) global translation of Header nav, Hero, Features, Services (cards + modals), Decision Guide, Pricing tabs, PoP section, FAQ, CTA, Footer, (d) 3+ service modals open/close (Cloud, VPS, Firewall, DC-to-DC) via X and Escape, (e) Radix Tabs interactions in Pricing (Dedicated/Colocation/Interconnect) switch correctly in both languages, (f) Firewall pricing shows 'Contact us for pricing' (EN) and 'Hubungi kami untuk harga' (ID) — no numeric price, (g) 4 PoP DC cards render in both languages with correct floor labels (Lantai 5 vs 5th Floor etc.), (h) FAQ accordion expand/collapse works, (i) all 15 wa.me links point to 6287812397187, (j) language persists across scroll and reload via localStorage ic_lang, (k) zero console errors/warnings, (l) no raw i18n keys or 'undefined'/'null' leaking into DOM.
critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.jsx cleanly falls back to entry.id when a translation is missing — prevents raw key leaks. Verified no leaks in DOM.
Two LanguageToggle instances (desktop + mobile) share the same React Context state — no divergence observed.
Services modal uses local template string for WA message (bypassing wa.prefilled.svc dict entry). Works correctly, but is a minor DRY violation. Not a blocker.

Similarly Pricing.jsx builds its own WA message per plan instead of using wa.prefilled.plan from dict. Both codepaths currently produce correct localized output; recommend consolidating for maintainability.

data-testids are present on all critical interactive elements (lang-toggle, service-card-*, service-modal, service-modal-close, service-modal-wa-*, pricing-tabs, tab-dedicated/colocation/interconnect, tab-content-*, pricing-card-*, pricing-cta-*, pop-card-*, pop-cta-wa, floating-whatsapp-btn, header-contact-cta). Excellent testability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bilingual overhaul is production-ready. LanguageContext (ic_lang localStorage) persists selection across reloads and scroll. Zero console errors on toggle. All 15 wa.me links use +6287812397187. If new sections are added, ensure they consume useLang()/pick() and add corresponding {id,en} entries in LanguageContext dict or bilingual objects in mock/data.js. Recommended future improvement: consolidate WA-message construction in Services.jsx/Pricing.jsx to use the wa.prefilled.svc/plan dict entries already defined.
rca of the issue: No issues found — 100% pass on all 11 requested test scenarios.
